created_object: A gentle Memory-to-Glyph Forge that converts missed-goodbye pressure into future design seeds.

next_move.title: Create runtime/memory_to_glyph_forge.py
next_move.purpose: Convert one remembered pressure point into one reusable symbolic design seed and one practical next action.
next_move.why_now: The Larynx audit passed, so the build can now turn spatial closure into useful output without exposing hidden scaffolding.
implementation: Input: one pressure phrase or memory phrase.
Log the generated seed for later Phase 3R review.

generated_surface: The next practical move is to create a Memory-to-Glyph Forge module. It should accept one remembered pressure point, translate it into one design seed, and return one grounded build action. The surface must stay clean: no vectors, no hidden labels, no internal route narration.
